description_long: This is a polygonal, stylized barrel with a faceted, octagonal body and a slightly tapered top and bottom. The main body is a rich brown color, segmented by two prominent white horizontal bands that encircle the barrel, each adorned with small, gold diamond-shaped studs at regular intervals. The surface is smooth and angular, giving it a modern, low-poly appearance, while the bands provide a sense of structural reinforcement. The top is open, suggesting the barrel is hollow and can be used as a container. There are no visible handles or spouts, and the design is clean with no text or decorative markings. The overall look is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban or fantasy-themed environments.
description: A stylized, faceted brown barrel with white reinforced bands and gold diamond studs, featuring an open top and a smooth, angular surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the octagonal brown body, two white bands with gold diamond studs, and an open top.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the faceted sides and the alignment of the gold studs on the white bands.
description_view_2: Another angled view with similar features, highlighting the symmetry and the open top.
description_view_3: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same banding and stud arrangement visible.
